scattering lengths of enriched Er oxides which are
affected by existence of other Er isotopes (especially
for Er-162,164.) It would be better to simplify the
entry by deletion of data compiled from Table 2 (i.e.,
can be done by deletion of data of fluorides and
results to obtain the data in 038 and 041-044.
